The '''Battle of Lorshan Pass''' was the first large-scale battle of the [[Summertime War]], and one of the last confrontations of the conflict. It resulted in a humiliating defeat for the [[Balawai]] militia at [[Lorshan Pass]], although at a high cost of the [[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]] [[Upland Liberation Front]]. The Battle of Lorshan Pass was won mostly due to a risky, strategic maneuver by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]].
